title: Dorsey Wants Buzz to Loosen Slack’s Hold on Workers
summary: Known as Buzz, the new service will include threads, direct messages and voice capabilities, all of which are available on Salesforce’s Slack, as well as code repositories (presumably like those in Microsoft’s GitHub) and automated workflows.
